title: Variable Scope Explorer
description: Students differentiate local from global variables by clicking variable names in a complete program and seeing which scope zone each variable belongs to, w
creator: Moving Rainbow
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Moving Rainbow
chapter_title: Python Functions, Modules, and Programming Best Practices

learningObjectives: Students differentiate local from global variables by clicking variable names in a complete program and seeing which scope zone each variable belongs to, with a plain-English explanation of why.

assessmentOpportunities: Students explain the demonstrated relationship in their own words.
